_comment: SAMPLE ONLY — not an active config. Merge the keys you want into the target project's .claude/settings.json. The UserPromptSubmit hook surfaces the harness contract as context; the Stop hook keeps the offline checks green after a working session. Paths assume the harness lives at agent_skills/ in the repo root.

hooks.command: echo 'agent_skills harness active: read core/AGENTS.md (agnostic contract) and project/prompts/use_skill_pack.md before building commands. Commands are built, never executed without confirmation; the local repo is the source of truth.'
python agent_skills/evals/run_benchmarks.py >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'agent_skills offline checks: PASS' || echo 'agent_skills offline checks: FAIL — run: python agent_skills/evals/run_benchmarks.py'
